task: Implement P1-SEC-A: expand _CANONICAL_GUARDS from 14 to 32 patterns + create check_arbitration_kernel.py hard-deny hook with HARD-DENY semantics.

Cross-cutting code review of all Wave 2A changes — verify P1-SEC-B byte-floor preservation + ADR-005 fail-open contract intact.
